'''kalocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:bdft|bdft]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-l-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bdft|bdft]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kalocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kælecheth|kælecheth]] || [[word:kælechej|kælechej]] || [[word:kælechesh|kælechesh]] || [[word:kæleche|kæleche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kalolochoth|kalolochoth]] || [[word:kalolochoj|kalolochoj]] || [[word:kalolochosh|kalolochosh]] || [[word:kalolocho|kalolocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kalochoth|kalochoth]] || [[word:kalochoj|kalochoj]] || [[word:kalochosh|kalochosh]] || [[word:kalocho|kalocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kalofchoth|kalofchoth]] || [[word:kalofchoj|kalofchoj]] || [[word:kalofchosh|kalofchosh]] || [[word:kalofchof|kalofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kalochotho|kalochotho]] || [[word:kalochojo|kalochojo]] || [[word:kalochosho|kalochosho]] || [[word:kalochoko|kalochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kalochoth|kalochoth]] || [[word:kalochoj|kalochoj]] || [[word:kalochosh|kalochosh]] || [[word:kalocho|kalocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kalochothol|kalochothol]] || [[word:kalochojol|kalochojol]] || [[word:kalochoshol|kalochoshol]] || [[word:kalochokol|kalochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kalochothotho|kalochothotho]] || [[word:kalochojojo|kalochojojo]] || [[word:kalochoshosho|kalochoshosho]] || [[word:kalochoko|kalochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kalochothon|kalochothon]] || [[word:kalochojon|kalochojon]] || [[word:kalochoshon|kalochoshon]] || [[word:kalochokon|kalochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kalochothoro|kalochothoro]] || [[word:kalochojoro|kalochojoro]] || [[word:kalochoshoro|kalochoshoro]] || [[word:kalochokoro|kalochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
